meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Debugging with AI to Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on freelance projects. Master debugging with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster, impress clients, and boost your bottom line.
content.answer_block: You finish projects by treating bugs as data, not blockers. By integrating Antigravity for structural analysis and Claude Code for iterative fixes, you automate the tedious hunt for errors. This workflow shifts your focus from manual line-by-line debugging to high-level architectural oversight, ensuring you ship production-ready code on time, every time.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, the client deadline is a ticking time bomb, and your project is trapped in a loop of 'fix one, break two.' This isn't a lack of talent; it’s a failure of process. You’re spinning your wheels in the mud of manual debugging while your competitors are already shipping their next milestone.

But what if you could outsource the frustration? By leveraging AI-native debugging, you transform your codebase from a tangled web into a predictable, modular stream. It’s time to stop fighting your editor and start orchestrating your success with the precision of a senior architect.

steps.title: Automated Error Isolation
steps.description: Don't guess where the crash happens. Use AI to parse your logs and pinpoint the exact file and line causing the runtime failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the attached error logs and map them to specific modules in the codebase. Identify the root cause and suggest a refactor plan.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze logs in ./logs/error.txt and identify the failing module'

steps.title: Context-Aware Refactoring
steps.description: When a fix breaks a dependency, you need a tool that understands the whole graph. Use Claude Code to ensure changes are scope-aware.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this function to handle null inputs without breaking existing dependencies. Ensure type safety is maintained.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add ./src/auth.ts --instructions 'fix null pointer exceptions while preserving existing session logic'

steps.title: Automated Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Never ship a fix without proof. Generate tests for the specific bug you just patched to prevent regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Jest test suite for this module that covers edge cases identified in the previous bug fix.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create unit tests for the modified function in ./src/services/data.ts'

steps.title: Dependency & Version Alignment
steps.description: Often, bugs aren't your code—they're the environment. Use AI to audit your package versions against current best practices.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit package.json for deprecated dependencies and suggest stable alternatives that resolve current build warnings.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit dependencies and update to stable versions'

steps.title: Final Architectural Sanity Check
steps.description: Before pushing to production, use AI to review the code for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a security and performance audit on the recently modified files. Flag any O(n^2) operations or potential injection points.

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'Definition of Done' file to ensure it aligns with your personal coding style.
Use Claude Code's `--verbose` flag during debugging to see the reasoning chain, which helps you learn the 'why' behind the fix.
Keep a 'Prompt Library' folder in your repo; reuse successful debugging prompts across different client projects to save time.
When debugging complex state, use Antigravity to generate a Mermaid.js diagram of the flow before asking for the fix.
Never accept the first AI suggestion; ask it to 'provide three alternative implementation strategies' to ensure you choose the most maintainable one.
content.next_steps: Integrate these CLI commands into your daily workflow for one week, then document the time saved per ticket to show your clients the value of your AI-augmented process.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs derail your freelance career. Gain the technical leverage you need to ship faster and scale your income. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
